title: Same-block silo padding self-selects the exit-tier and bypasses the cooldown lock
description: A redeemer can lock fee-free 'padding' shares into the silo to shift `coverage()` into the least-restrictive tier before their real redemption in the same block. This bypasses the cooldown lock.

title: `UnstakeCooldown`'s 70-slot merge path permanently DoSes Saturn/Midas unstake queues
description: When a receiver's active-request count reaches `MAX_ACTIVE_REQUEST_SLOTS` (70), the transfer function unconditionally reuses the last request's proxy, which always reverts for Saturn/Midas tokens once the cap is hit.

title: `metaKey` nonce starts at the reserved sentinel, permanently poisoning `strategyOptions` routing
description: The first strategyOptions-bearing cooldown request for any `(vault, receiver)` pair is assigned `metaKey = bytes12(0)`, the sentinel value. This prevents later requests from being properly handled.

title: `finalizeWithFee` checks the wrong owner's withdrawal cap, spuriously blocking legitimate early exits
description: The pre-redeem check computes `maxAssets` with the restricted Junior cap, while the actual redeem call is exempted from this floor.

title: `AprPairProvider` discards oracle observation timestamps, defeating downstream staleness checks
description: `AprPairProvider` stamps `timestamp = block.timestamp` and discards the real timestamps returned by the underlying oracle calls. This defeats downstream staleness checks.

title: Silo padding also griefs other same-block redeemers
description: Locking Junior padding lowers `coverage()`, forcing any other same-block Senior redeemer into the worst tier.

title: Coverage mixes real-T0 and projected valuation bases
description: Under `DiscreteAccounting`, the Junior term subtracts `convertToAssets` from `totalAssetsT0()`, using different valuation bases for each side.

title: Batched `finalize` has no analogous cap check
description: `finalizeWithFee` guards against `maxWithdraw`, but the permissionless batched path relies solely on `Tranche.redeem`'s silo-owner `maxRedeem`, bypassing the `minimumJrtSrtRatio` floor.

title: Reserve-decomposition floor drops up to `ONE_ASSET` of value from the NAV decrement
description: The Senior-side cap reduces the deducted total without a matching reduction on the Junior side, under-decrementing recorded NAV.

title: Dust redemptions revert instead of charging zero fee
description: `sharesFee` rounds to 0 for small `shares` under a low fee tier, and the `require(sharesFee > 0)` reverts the whole call.

title: `RoundingGuard` lets deposits over-credit NAV by â‰¤1 wei
description: `preferOriginalWithin1Wei` credits the original deposit amount even when the strategy round-trip actually netted 1 wei less.

title: Cooldown-proxy initializer is unprotected on the proxy itself
description: `initialize` is `public` with no access restriction beyond the OZ `initializer` modifier.

title: `depositWithPermit` can be griefed via signature front-running
description: A griefer can submit the victim's permit signature directly to the token first, consuming the nonce.

title: `UnstakeCooldown`'s same-block reuse also reverts on Saturn/Midas
description: Two same-block redemptions to one receiver on a Saturn/Midas-backed token hit the same `pending == true` re-request revert.

title: Reused proxy's unlock time can be pushed forward for the whole batch
description: The 70-slot-full merge branch extends `requests[last].unlockAt` forward whenever the new unlock is later.

title: Fee-on-transfer tokens desync recorded vs. actual silo balance
description: `req.amount` records the requested amount, not the amount actually received via `safeTransferFrom`. This causes desynchronization on fee-on-transfer or rebasing tokens.

title: `UnstakeCooldown.finalize` gates pending proxies against the current implementation, not the one they were created under
description: `isCooldownActive()` is read from `implementations[token]`, which can diverge from the implementation a pooled/in-flight proxy was actually created against.

title: `AprPairFeed`'s pull-fallback path has no freshness gate
description: The push path enforces `StaleUpdate`/`OutOfOrderUpdate`, but the pull-fallback inside `latestRoundData` validates only APR-value bounds and returns the provider's timestamp unchecked.

title: `TrancheDepositor.deposit` lacks the `nonReentrant` guard its permit sibling has
description: `deposit` lacks the `nonReentrant` guard while `depositWithPermit` has it.

title: A third party can force-finalize a victim's redemption into an unwanted token
description: `finalize(vault, user, at)` is fully permissionless and always redeems to the request's preconfigured `req.token`, denying the victim the chance to call `finalizeWithOverrides` or `finalizeWithTokenOverride`.

title: Default swap slippage floor truncates to zero for small deposits
description: When `swapAmountOutMinimum` is left at 0, the fallback floor truncates to zero for small `amount`, silently disabling the default slippage guard.

title: Cooldown-tier lock check ignores two of the three coverage bands
description: The global 'is any lock active' check inspects only `p1`/`r2.sharesLock`, not `r0`/`r1.sharesLock`. An admin bounds configuration with `p1 == 0` (forcing `p0 == 0`) but a nonzero `r0.sharesLock` would let a request created under `r0` become instantly claimable despite carrying a real `unlockAt`.

title: Valuation-loss auto-pause has no auto re-enable on recovery
description: Entering a valuation loss auto-disables JRT withdrawals and SRT deposits, but restoring `valuationPrice == 1e18` does not re-enable them.
